home.tagline: Choose your game, conflict and faction to start building your list.

conflicts.title: Choose a conflict
conflicts.comingSoon: No conflicts loaded for this game yet. Check back soon!

factionDetail.emptyColumn: Drag units and commanders here, or press Add with this {{groupLower}} in focus.
factionDetail.notAvailable: Not available due to army restrictions

reasons.maxRatioTo: You need more {{unitName}} in the list (max ratio {{ratioText}})
reasons.maxRatioToOwnLightOrdnance: You need more Light Ordnance units first (max {{max}})

warnings.battaliaMaxOption: This {{groupLower}} exceeds the maximum of {{max}} with the {{name}} option
warnings.noUnitsAssigned: This {{groupLower}} has no units assigned yet

export.dialogHint: Choose a name for this list. It will be used as the sheet title and the file name.
export.blockedUnassigned: Assign all units to a {{group}} before exporting

save.signInRequired: Sign in to save your list
save.guestNotice: You can build your list without signing in, but you won't be able to save it. Sign in to save, load and edit your lists.
save.dialogHint: Choose a name for this list. You'll be able to load and edit it later from "My Lists".
save.error: Couldn't save the list. Please try again.

myLists.title: My Lists
myLists.notConfigured: List saving isn't available in this app yet.
myLists.signInHint: Sign in to view, load and edit your saved lists.
myLists.empty: You don't have any saved lists yet.
myLists.name: Name
myLists.loadError: Couldn't load your lists. Please try again.
